name: Seeed XIAO ESP32-C6
notes: Seeed XIAO ESP32-C6: 21 x 17.5 mm, ESP32-C6 (RISC-V, Wi-Fi 6 + BLE + 802.15.4 Zigbee/Thread, 4 MB flash). 11 GPIOs broken out as D0-D10, 7 pads per side.
The D0-D10 to GPIO map is specific to this model - a XIAO ESP32-C3 or S3 uses different GPIOs behind the same silkscreen.
None of the C6 strapping pins (GPIO4/5/8/9/15) are broken out, so every header pin is free to use; BOOT (GPIO9) and the user LED (GPIO15) stay on-board.
